creator: dirk.meyer@dinoex.sub.org
text:
The Project have been renamed to "xymon"
	lastes Release:
	http://sourceforge.net/project/showfiles.php?group_id=128058&package_id=140220
		 	xymon-4.2.2.tar.gz  

	I would like to request a repocopy instead of createing a new port.

	Affected ports:
	net-mgmt/hobbit-client
	net-mgmt/hobbit-server

Fix: 

repocopy net-mgmt/hobbit-client -> net-mgmt/xymon-client
	repocopy net-mgmt/hobbit-server -> net-mgmt/xymon-server
